text:
Once upon a time, in a world untouched by technology, there was a shy girl named Luna.

She loved exploring her quiet town at night. The moonlit branches whispered secrets to her, and the distant hum of nocturnal wildlife enchanted her.

One night, as Luna wandered through a grove of moonlight flowers, she stumbled upon an old gnarled tree. Curious, she climbed up into its branches.

In the tree hollowed out was a quaint little cottage. There lived an owl named Orion. Orion could sing tales of ancient moons that could soothe the hardest hearts.

So Luna snuggled into Orion's nest. Orion told stories about stars twinkling in other galaxies. Luna listened until sleep claimed her exhausted eyes.

Dreamed of adventures through the universe. Orion winked conspiratorially. "There are galaxies filled with stars more brilliant than the moon."

Lucifer occasionally bellowed laughter. Perhaps one day celestial music would lift her thoughts.
